首页 分类 周报 计划 关于

Designing Data-Intensive Applications 02

the fundamental ideas that apply to all data systems

  1. Chapter 1 introduces the terminology and approach that we’re going to use throughout this book. It examines what we actually mean by words like reliability, scalability, and maintainability, and how we can try to achieve these goals.

    第一章讲了数据系统设计的基本原则，可靠性，扩展性和可维护性。什么是可靠性，扩展性和可维护性？我们又该如何实现这些目标？

  2. Chapter 2 compares several different data models and query languages—the most visible distinguishing factor between databases from a developer’s point of view. We will see how different models are appropriate to different situations. 第二章比较了几种不同的数据模型和查询语言，这些是从开发者的角度来看数据库最明显的区别。我们将看到不同的数据模型适用于不同的情况。

  3. Chapter 3 turns to the internals of storage engines and looks at how databases lay out data on disk. Different storage engines are optimized for different workloads, and choosing the right one can have a huge effect on performance. 第三章讲了存储引擎的内部实现，数据库是如何在磁盘上布局数据的。不同的存储引擎针对不同的工作负载进行优化，选择正确的存储引擎可以对性能产生巨大的影响。

  4. Chapter 4 compares various formats for data encoding (serialization) and especially examines how they fare in an environment where application requirements change and schemas need to adapt over time. 第四章比较了各种数据编码（序列化）格式，特别是它们在应用需求变化和模式需要随时间适应的环境中的表现。

Chapter 1: Reliable, Scalable, and Maintainable Applications
